texts.label: Discovering Japan
texts.blob: 日本は魅力的な国です。代表的な都市には、東京・京都・大阪などがあります。また、人気の料理としては「寿司」「ラーメン」「天ぷら」などが挙げられます。観光客は、①神社やお寺を訪れる、②温泉を楽しむ、③四季の景色を味わう、といった体験を楽しめます。例えば、春には桜、夏には祭り、秋には紅葉、冬には雪景色が見られます。「百聞は一見にしかず」ということわざがあるように、実際に訪れることで日本の魅力をより深く理解できるでしょう。

sentences.japanese: 日本は魅力的な国です。
sentences.english: Japan is a fascinating country.

sentences.japanese: 代表的な都市には、東京・京都・大阪などがあります。
sentences.english: Representative cities include Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka.

sentences.japanese: また、人気の料理としては「寿司」「ラーメン」「天ぷら」などが挙げられます。
sentences.english: Also, popular dishes include sushi, ramen, and tempura.

sentences.japanese: 観光客は、①神社やお寺を訪れる、②温泉を楽しむ、③四季の景色を味わう、といった体験を楽しめます。
sentences.english: Tourists can enjoy experiences such as ① visiting shrines and temples, ② enjoying hot springs, and ③ savoring the scenery of the four seasons.

sentences.japanese: 例えば、春には桜、夏には祭り、秋には紅葉、冬には雪景色が見られます。
sentences.english: For example, in spring there are cherry blossoms, in summer festivals, in autumn the autumn leaves, and in winter snowy scenery.

sentences.japanese: 「百聞は一見にしかず」ということわざがあるように、実際に訪れることで日本の魅力をより深く理解できるでしょう。
sentences.english: As the proverb "seeing once is better than hearing a hundred times" goes, by actually visiting you can understand Japan's charm more deeply.

texts.label: Intro to Japan
texts.blob: 日本は東アジアにある島国です。首都は東京で、日本で最も大きな都市です。日本には美しい自然や長い歴史があり、四季を楽しむことができます。寿司やラーメンなどの日本料理は世界中で人気があります。日本は技術やアニメでも有名です。

sentences.japanese: 日本は東アジアにある島国です。
sentences.english: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

sentences.japanese: 首都は東京で、日本で最も大きな都市です。
sentences.english: The capital is Tokyo, the largest city in Japan.

sentences.japanese: 日本には美しい自然や長い歴史があり、四季を楽しむことができます。
sentences.english: Japan has beautiful nature and a long history, and you can enjoy the four seasons.

sentences.japanese: 寿司やラーメンなどの日本料理は世界中で人気があります。
sentences.english: Japanese cuisine such as sushi and ramen is popular all over the world.

sentences.japanese: 日本は技術やアニメでも有名です。
sentences.english: Japan is also famous for technology and anime.

texts.label: The Beginning (ONE OK ROCK)
texts.blob:
[ワンオクロック ｢The Beginning｣ 歌詞]

[Intro]
Just give me a reason
To keep my heart beating
Don't worry, it's safe right here in my arms
As the world falls apart around us
All we can do is hold on, hold on

[Breakdown]
Take my hand
And bring me back, yeah

[Verse 1]
I'll risk everything if it's for you
A whisper into the night
Tellin' me it's not my time and don't give up
I've never stood up before, this time
でも譲れないもの
握ったこの手は離さない

[Pre-Chorus]
So stand up, stand up
Just gotta keep, I wanna wake up, wake up
Just tell me how I can never give up
狂おしいほど刹那の艶麗

[Chorus]
Just tell me why, baby
They might call me crazy
For saying, "I'll fight until there is no more"
愁いを含んだ閃光 眼光は感覚的衝動
Blinded, I can't see the end
So where do I begin?

[Verse 2]
Say not a word, I can hear you
The silence between us
何もないように映ってるだけ
I'll take this chance and I'll make it mine
ただ隠せないもの
飾ったように見せかけてる

[Pre-Chorus]
So stand up, stand up
Just gotta keep, I wanna wake up, wake up
Just tell me how I can never give up
悲しみと切なさの艶麗

[Chorus]
Just give me a reason
To keep my heart beating
Don't worry, it's safe right here in my arms
くだけて泣いて咲いて散った この思いは
So blinded, I can't see the end
Look how far we've made it
The pain I can't escape it
このままじゃ まだ終わらせる事は出来ないでしょ？
何度くたばりそうでも
朽ち果てようとも 終わりはないさ
So where do I begin?


[Bridge]
握りしめた 失わぬようにと
手を広げれば こぼれ落ちそうで
失うものなどなかった 日々の惰性を捨てて
君を

[Chorus]
Just tell me why, baby
They might call me crazy (Crazy)
For saying, "I'll fight until there is no more" (No more)
愁いを含んだ閃光 眼光は感覚的衝動
Blinded, I can't see the end
Look how far we've made it (Made it)
The pain I can't escape it (Escape it)
このままじゃ まだ終わらせる事は出来ないでしょ？
何度くたばりそうでも (Oh, wee, yeah)
朽ち果てようとも 終わりはないさ (Yeah)
It finally begins

sentences.japanese: でも譲れないもの
sentences.english: But there are things I won't give up

sentences.japanese: 握ったこの手は離さない
sentences.english: I won't let go of this hand I've grasped

sentences.japanese: 狂おしいほど刹那の艶麗
sentences.english: A fleeting beauty, maddening enough to drive you wild

sentences.japanese: 愁いを含んだ閃光 眼光は感覚的衝動
sentences.english: A flash laced with sorrow; my piercing gaze, a sensory impulse

sentences.japanese: 何もないように映ってるだけ
sentences.english: It only appears as though there is nothing

sentences.japanese: ただ隠せないもの
sentences.english: Yet there are things I simply can't hide

sentences.japanese: 飾ったように見せかけてる
sentences.english: Putting on a show, as if all dressed up

sentences.japanese: 悲しみと切なさの艶麗
sentences.english: The beauty of sadness and aching longing

sentences.japanese: くだけて泣いて咲いて散った この思いは
sentences.english: Shattered, weeping, blooming, scattered — these feelings of mine

sentences.japanese: このままじゃ まだ終わらせる事は出来ないでしょ？
sentences.english: I can't let it end like this just yet, can I?

sentences.japanese: 何度くたばりそうでも
sentences.english: No matter how many times I feel ready to drop dead

sentences.japanese: 朽ち果てようとも 終わりはないさ
sentences.english: Even if I rot away, there is no end

sentences.japanese: 握りしめた 失わぬようにと
sentences.english: I clenched it tight, so as not to lose it

sentences.japanese: 手を広げれば こぼれ落ちそうで
sentences.english: If I open my hand, it feels like it'll spill away

sentences.japanese: 失うものなどなかった 日々の惰性を捨てて
sentences.english: Casting off the inertia of days when I had nothing to lose

sentences.japanese: 君を
sentences.english: ...you
